seoTitle: Lockyer vs Logan Central — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lockyer and Logan Central. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lockyer vs Logan Central: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lockyer and Logan Central.
heading: Lockyer vs Logan Central — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lockyer, Queensland and Logan Central, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Logan Central has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Lockyer (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lockyer or Logan Central safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lockyer has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Logan Central scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lockyer scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Logan Central scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lockyer or Logan Central?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Logan Central has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
